status_policy.incomplete: not started or not yet materially advanced
status_policy.blocked: cannot proceed without external condition or approval
status_policy.needs_approval: ready but requires Nate approval before action
status_policy.complete: done only when completion criteria, testing criteria, and receipts are satisfied

operating_rules: Every task starts incomplete/blocked/needs_approval, never complete.
A task cannot be marked complete without receipts and test/evidence notes.
Approval gates override convenience and momentum.
Chat is not state; update this file and write receipts.

tasks.title: Verify live Supabase schema/RLS assumptions with read-only anon checks
tasks.blocker: None. Read-only anon verification and separately approved anonymous write-denial verification passed.
completion_criteria: live project verified without printing secrets
no schema write except separately approved migration
tasks.approval_gate: Completed; anonymous write-denial was explicitly approved.

tasks.title: Add field-note privacy preflight before external tester data
tasks.blocker: None for the application-level acknowledgement guard; live schema hardening is tracked separately.
tasks.approval_gate: Completed as a local application/copy slice.

tasks.title: Apply pre-alpha privacy-hardening migration and anonymous RLS proof
tasks.blocker: None for migration application and anonymous proof. Authenticated-role proof remains a separate approval-gated task.
completion_criteria: redacted receipt records no release/deploy action
tasks.approval_gate: Nate explicitly approved live application after the linked dry-run.

tasks.title: Run controlled author/unrelated-user RLS proof against the applied privacy schema
tasks.blocker: Requires explicit approval to create controlled authenticated test identities/data and a cleanup/retention plan. Do not use real neighbor data.
completion_criteria: author can read own private request and restricted field note
unrelated signed-in user cannot read either
publication-only field-note read policy is demonstrated
test rows/accounts are removed or retained only under explicit decision
testing_criteria: all role assertions are recorded redacted
tasks.approval_gate: Nate must approve test-account/data creation and cleanup plan before execution.
